name: io.github.pageguard/pageguard-mcp
title: PageGuard MCP
description: Scan any project or website for privacy compliance issues directly in your AI coding tool. Detects tracking technologies, cookies, and third-party data collection. Works in Claude Code, Cursor, and Windsurf.

environmentVariables.name: PAGEGUARD_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: PageGuard API key — required for URL scanning and document generation, optional for local scans
